title: Smoky Berry Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful dessert inspired by North African spices, featuring a smoky berry filling and a crunchy almond crust.

ingredients.name: Algerian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and smoked almonds.
Add in egg and vanilla extract, mixing until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and place in a 9-inch tart pan.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden.
In a separate bowl, mix together sloe berries, Algerian spice blend, and sugar.
Pour the berry mixture into the baked tart crust.
Bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the filling is bubbly and the crust is golden brown.
